title: Row-Level Multi-Tenancy
instruction: Plan the refactor to add row-level multi-tenancy to an existing single-tenant Django application. Every model must be scoped to a Tenant, all queries must automatically filter by the current tenant (no per-view boilerplate), cross-tenant data leaks must be impossible, and migrations must be backwards-compatible with existing single-tenant data.
codebase_context:
```
# Django 5, ~15 models, single-tenant today
app/
  tenants/       # does not exist yet
  users/
    models.py    # User, Profile
  billing/
    models.py    # Invoice, Payment
  projects/
    models.py    # Project, Task, Comment
middleware.py   # currently only does auth
```
